title: VimFu — What's Next?
description: You've learned the core of Vim. Here's what lies ahead: plugins, LSP, Treesitter, and the endless journey of mastery.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

steps.say: Congratulations. You've made it through five hundred lessons of Vim Fu. You know motions, operators, text objects, registers, macros, marks, folds, and so much more.
But this is just the beginning. Here's what lies ahead.
Plugins. Vim has a massive ecosystem. Plugin managers like lazy dot nvim make installation easy. Popular plugins include telescope for fuzzy finding, oil for file browsing, and fugitive for git.
L S P. Language Server Protocol gives you auto-completion, go to definition, rename, and diagnostics. Neovim has built-in L S P support.
Treesitter. It gives Neovim a real syntax tree for better highlighting, text objects, and code navigation. It understands your code structurally.
DAP. The Debug Adapter Protocol lets you debug code right inside Neovim with breakpoints and stepping.
The key to mastery is practice. Use Vim every day. When you find yourself doing something repetitive, look for a better way. There almost always is one.
Read colon help. Experiment. Break things. The Vim community is welcoming and full of knowledge.
Thank you for watching Vim Fu. Now go build something amazing.
